imageAlt: Pay an invoice with Tap to Pay roadmap item preview image
title: Pay an invoice with Tap to Pay
summaryBody: Turns your mobile phone into a contactless payment terminal and allows our customers to request in-person payments for Invoices via the mobile app using Stripe’s Tap to Pay.
detailBody: Turns your mobile phone into a contactless payment terminal and allows our customers to request in-person payments for Invoices via the mobile app using Stripe’s Tap to Pay.
